editor._comment: Editor: theme, font, tab, indent, wrap

display._comment: Display: line numbers, highlight, cursor style, helpbar, logo gradient, side panels, terminal position

files._comment: Files: encoding, line ending, auto save, large file prompt

search._comment: Search: case, whole word, regex, wrap

themes._comment: Themes: current, optional available list, custom themes (see docs)
themes._comment_available_themes_1: monokai, dracula, solarized-dark, solarized-light, onedark, nord, gruvbox, tokyo-night, catppuccin, material
themes._comment_available_themes_2: ayu, github, github-dark, markdown-dark, vscode-dark, night-owl, palenight, oceanic-next, kanagawa, tomorrow-night
themes._comment_available_themes_3: tomorrow-night-blue, cobalt, zenburn, base16-dark, papercolor, rose-pine, everforest, jellybeans, desert, slate
themes._comment_available_themes_4: atom-one-light, tokyo-night-day, blue-light, cyberpunk, hacker, hatsune-miku, minions, batman, spongebob

animation._comment_effect: Available effects: none, pulse, scanner, shimmer, wave, strobe, horizontal, rain, ripple, spiral, bounce, fade, glitch, neon, comet, breath, disco, matrix, aurora, flame, rainbow

lsp._comment: LSP: same language_id as built-in overrides built-in (config first); empty fields fall back to built-in. Add entries with new language_id to extend.
